raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserts radical personal agency and responsibility for change",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "only the individual possesses the capacity to alter their own condition",
    "external agents or circumstances cannot produce alteration",
    "the self is the sole sufficient cause of change"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a strict monadic claim but presupposes an isolated self whose boundaries are unaffected by relational or structural factors",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the individual must retain meaningful volitional control over relevant variables and the statement must function to increase perceived self-efficacy without denying necessary external supports",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the condition is substantially maintained by factors outside individual control (e.g., trauma, systemic oppression, neurobiological constraints) or when the statement is used to dismiss legitimate need for external intervention"
}

external agents or circumstances cannot produce alteration
the self is the sole sufficient cause of change

parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: the condition is substantially maintained by factors outside individual control (e.g., trauma, systemic oppression, neurobiological constraints) or when the statement is used to dismiss legitimate need for external intervention
